title: One Click Join
description: Instantly join your last Minecraft server from the main menu!
body: ![A screenshot of the minecraft title screen. Beside the 'Multiplayer' button, there is a button with the logo for the Hypixel Minecraft Server. The mouse is hovered over it, the tooltip reads 'Join server Hypixel...'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63e69ac2724b0ddf56f807b05a6174a6fcce0437_0.webp) One Click Join is a Minecraft mod that allows you to join your last Minecraft server through a button on the main menu! The last minecraft server that you join will be remembered, and when you return to the main menu or restart your game, a button will appear beside the multiplayer button, allowing you to re-join that server in one click. *Servers joined via the 'Direct Connect' feature, or by another mod connecting you to a server, will not be recognized by One Click Join.* ### Have any issues or suggestions? If you're having issues with One Click Join, or you'd like to make a suggestion, you can do so over on the [GitHub issues](https://github.com/caoimhebyrne/one-click-join/issues) page.
